name: MCD MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from the M-China organization providing access to MCD (likely a Chinese data or cloud service platform). Enables AI agents to query and interact with MCD platform data services. Specific platform details limited due to primarily Chinese documentation.
use_cases: Querying MCD platform data from agent workflows
Integrating MCD data services into AI-driven automation
Accessing Chinese cloud data services from AI agents
Data retrieval and management workflows on MCD platform
not_for: Teams not using the MCD platform
best_when: A team on the Chinese MCD platform wants AI agents to access their data services programmatically.
avoid_when: You don't use MCD platform. Limited documentation available in English — difficult to evaluate fitness for non-Chinese teams.

pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. MCD platform subscription required.

known_agent_gotchas: Documentation primarily in Chinese — limited English resources available
Platform-specific tool — requires MCD platform access
CN data residency — review regulatory compliance
Limited external visibility into platform stability and roadmap
agent_readiness.security_notes: CN data residency. API key auth. Limited documentation makes security posture difficult to assess externally.

security_score_components.security_notes: CN data residency. Limited public security documentation. API key auth assumed.
